hook.summary: High-intensity FPS gameplay featuring a lava-skinned weapon and immediate level-up feedback.
hook.visual_action: First-person view of a player firing a glowing lava rifle at enemies in a blocky arena.

scene_flow: Player engages an enemy at medium range with a lava-textured assault rifle.
A 'Level Up' notification in Spanish appears after the first kill.
The player maneuvers through a blocky, yellow and black arena to find more targets.
Close-quarters combat ensues, showing damage numbers and a green healing effect.
audience_proxy: Young competitive gamers who enjoy fast-paced FPS titles within the Roblox ecosystem.
